title: 有馬記念の後に・燃料、補給

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun runs with all she's got, but she
ultimately loses to Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Still, she enjoyed the race so much she can't
contain her excitement.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She also realizes that Narita Brian is not yet
satisfied, so...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She decides to give her yet another exciting bout
at the Hanshin Daishoten.
